pages.title: `/fpscompress debug`
pages.text: $(bold)Usage$(): /fpscompress debug$(br2)$(bold)Shows$(): $(li)PreFab states (BUILDING/SIMULATING/CACHED/HALTED) $(li)Face configurations $(li)Linked Importers/Exporters $(li)Cached rates (if available)$(br2)$(bold)Note$(): Debug commands may require operator permission

pages.title: `/fpscompress reload`
pages.text: $(bold)Usage$() (future feature): /fpscompress reload$(br2)$(bold)Purpose$(): $(li)Reload config files $(li)Refresh Importer/Exporter registry $(li)Force re-scan of CM dimension$(br2)---
